businessSummary.oneLiner: World's largest publicly traded Ethereum holder, applying MicroStrategy's Bitcoin playbook to Ethereum
businessSummary.description: Originally a Bitcoin mining company, pivoted to Ethereum treasury strategy after Tom Lee (Fundstrat co-founder) joined. Holds 4,596,000 ETH (3.81% of total supply) as of 3/16, with total crypto + cash of $11.5B. Monday close $22.60 (+10.03%). ETH rally to $2,250 drove the surge. ARK (Cathie Wood), Founders Fund, Pantera among premier institutional backers. Eightco ($ORBS) additional $80M investment provides indirect OpenAI exposure.
howTheyMakeMoney: ETH Staking: 3,040,515 ETH staked, ~$180M+ annual revenue
Dividend: 5.3% yield, only crypto treasury company paying dividends
Moonshot Investments: Beast Industries $200M, Eightco (ORBS) $94M (indirect OpenAI exposure)

keyMetrics.name: P/B (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Trading at 17% discount to NAV. Total assets $11.8B vs market cap $9.8B

keyMetrics.name: ETH Holdings
keyMetrics.interpretation: 3.81% of total ETH supply. World's largest public ETH treasury. 76% of '5% Alchemy' target

keyMetrics.name: Total Crypto + Cash
keyMetrics.interpretation: ETH $10.3B (at $2,250) + Cash $1.2B + Moonshots $294M. Rising on ETH rebound

keyMetrics.name: Dividend Yield
keyMetrics.interpretation: Only crypto treasury company with dividends. Income investor appeal

keyMetrics.name: Staked ETH
keyMetrics.interpretation: 66% of holdings staked. $180M+ annual passive income

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Loss-making due to ETH mark-to-market. P/B (0.83x) is the appropriate metric, trading at a deep discount to S&P 500 average P/B (4.5x)

keyMetrics.name: Daily Trading Volume
keyMetrics.interpretation: Top-tier US stock liquidity. Institutional-grade volume

keyMetrics.name: YTD Return
keyMetrics.interpretation: Down from year-start but rebounding. ETH SuperTrend flipped bullish

growthDrivers.title: Monday +10.03% Surge on ETH Rally and $11.5B Treasury Disclosure
growthDrivers.description: GURUFocus (3/16): BMNR closed at $22.60 (+10.03%), reaching intraday high of $23.24. ETH breaking $2,250 lifted treasury value. Combined with $11.5B disclosure and institutional backer reveal.

growthDrivers.title: ETH SuperTrend Flipped to Buy, Historically Preceded 52%/174% Rallies
growthDrivers.description: Ali Charts (3/16): First SuperTrend buy signal since September. Previous two instances led to 52% and 174% gains. Major technical bullish signal for ETH and BMNR.

growthDrivers.title: Premier Institutional Backers Officially Revealed
growthDrivers.description: PRNewswire (3/16): ARK (Cathie Wood), MOZAYYX, Founders Fund, Bill Miller III, Pantera, Kraken, DCG, Galaxy Digital officially disclosed as backers for the first time.

growthDrivers.title: Eightco (ORBS) Additional $80M Investment, Indirect OpenAI Exposure
growthDrivers.description: PRNewswire (3/16): $80M additional to ORBS (total $94M). ORBS holds $50M in OpenAI shares, the only publicly traded company with direct OpenAI equity.

growthDrivers.title: MAVAN Staking Platform Q1 2026 Launch Imminent
growthDrivers.description: Made in America Validator Network to reduce third-party staking fees. Revenue improvement expected.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: Largest public ETH holdings at 3.81% of supply. Tom Lee + ARK + Founders Fund + Pantera top-tier institutional backing. Only large-scale player applying MicroStrategy's BTC strategy to ETH.

moats.description: 3.81% of total ETH supply. 76% toward '5% Alchemy' target. Irreplaceable market position.
ARK (Cathie Wood), Founders Fund, Pantera, Galaxy Digital. Premier crypto institutions.
3M+ ETH staked + MAVAN platform. 5.3% dividend plus passive income.

competitors.name: MicroStrategy (MSTR)
competitors.detail: Bitcoin treasury pioneer. BTC focus vs BMNR's ETH focus

competitors.name: Grayscale Ethereum Trust (ETHE)
competitors.detail: ETH ETF competitor. Different fee structure

competitors.name: Coinbase (COIN)
competitors.detail: Exchange-based crypto exposure. Fundamentally different model

recentNews.headline: BMNR surges 10.03% to $22.60, intraday high $23.24. ETH rally + $11.5B disclosure
recentNews.significance: Double-digit gain in a broadly positive market. ETH rebound and institutional revelation drove momentum

recentNews.headline: 24/7 Wall St: Bitmine soars 11%, Tom Lee's Ethereum bet gets even bigger
recentNews.significance: 4,596,000 ETH (3.81% of supply). 60,999 ETH purchase was the largest of 2026

recentNews.headline: ETH SuperTrend flips to Buy for first time since September. Previous signals: +52%, +174%
recentNews.significance: Powerful technical buy signal. BMNR as leveraged ETH play stands to benefit disproportionately

recentNews.headline: CoinCentral: Bitmine makes largest ETH purchase of 2026 (60,999 ETH), cash at $1.2B
recentNews.significance: Aggressive accumulation while maintaining $1.2B cash. Balanced aggression and stability

recentNews.headline: Bitcoin hits $74,200, ETH breaks $2,250. Strait of Hormuz tensions ease, crypto rallies
recentNews.significance: Oil pullback + geopolitical de-escalation drives broad crypto recovery

analystOpinions.notableComment: B. Riley $30 Strong Buy maintained. Coverage extremely limited, but ARK/Pantera direct investment indicates strong institutional conviction. ETH rally could drive upgrades.

risks.title: ETH price dependency (90%+ of assets in ETH)
risks.description: 4,596,000 ETH is the vast majority of assets. ETH dropping to $1,500 would shrink treasury to $6.9B, NAV down 30%+.

risks.title: Short seller report impact + extreme volatility
risks.description: Culper Research short report effects persist. Stock collapsed 86% from 52-week high of $161.

risks.title: Extremely limited analyst coverage
risks.description: Only 1 formal coverage. Despite growing institutional interest, price discovery remains inefficient.

risks.title: Ongoing share dilution
risks.description: Equity issuance to fund ETH purchases. 833,000 ETH acquired in 35 days raises dilution concerns.

risks.title: Regulatory risk
risks.description: SEC crypto regulation changes, potential ETH security classification. Treasury company accounting standard risks.

buyReasons.title: P/B 0.83x, 17% discount to NAV
buyReasons.rationale: Market cap $9.8B vs assets $11.8B. MSTR trades at P/B 2-3x. Closing the discount alone implies 20%+ upside.

buyReasons.title: ETH SuperTrend buy signal, historically preceded 52%/174% gains
buyReasons.rationale: First buy signal since September. If ETH enters a sustained rally, BMNR's leveraged exposure amplifies gains.

buyReasons.title: Premier institutional backers (ARK, Founders Fund, Pantera)
buyReasons.rationale: Cathie Wood, Peter Thiel's Founders Fund, Pantera directly invested. Institutional credibility unmatched in crypto stocks.

buyReasons.title: 5.3% dividend + staking + OpenAI indirect exposure
buyReasons.rationale: Only crypto treasury with dividends, MAVAN staking launch imminent, Eightco provides OpenAI equity exposure.

overallOpinion: BMNR surged 10% on Monday as ETH broke $2,250 and the SuperTrend indicator flipped to buy for the first time since September. Previous SuperTrend buy signals preceded 52% and 174% rallies.

Market cap $9.8B with $11.8B in the vault (P/B 0.83x). ARK, Founders Fund, and Pantera are backing this, and it pays a 5.3% dividend. MicroStrategy gets P/B 2-3x for BTC, so the discount here is striking.
Closed at $22.60, breaking above the 50-day SMA ($22.50). Target $30 (+33%). If ETH's rally has legs, this is still early innings.

investmentVerdict.summary: ETH SuperTrend buy signal and 50-day SMA breakout create a strong technical setup. NAV discount of 17% with ARK, Founders Fund backing. ETH downside remains the core risk, so keep position size at 5-10% of portfolio.

sources.description: 11% surge, Tom Lee ETH bet expansion

sources.description: BMNR falling wedge pattern, comeback outlook

$BMNR (Mar 17) $22.60 (+10.03%)

ETH broke $2,250 and BMNR surged 10%. The ETH SuperTrend indicator flipped to buy for the first time since September. Previous buy signals preceded 52% and 174% rallies.

Market cap $9.8B, vault holds $11.8B (P/B 0.83x). ARK, Founders Fund, Pantera are behind it. Bought 60,999 ETH (largest of 2026) while keeping $1.2B cash. 5.3% dividend.

50-day SMA ($22.50) cleared. Target $30 (+33%). If this is the start of an ETH rally cycle, we're still in the early innings.
